This site is MultiAgency's reference deployment of the Agency Dashboard Template — a customizable dashboard for on-chain agencies on NEAR.

The template extends the everything.dev runtime, shaped into a dashboard that integrates with Trezu (Sputnik DAO treasury) and NEARN (contributor sourcing). Off-chain ledger surfaces (budgets, billings) mirror agency decisions; the Sputnik DAO contract is the source of truth for funds and governance.

Architecture:
- host: runtime shell, auth boundary, request handling, runtime config loader
- ui: remote interface loaded through Module Federation
- api: remote backend loaded through every-plugin

Public surface:
- / — landing
- /work — projects directory (enriched live from NEARN where linked)
- /team — DAO roles, members, permissions (read from chain)
- /treasury — live on-chain treasury balances; `payouts` tab carries DAO proposal / payout history
- /docs — handbook (models, skills, legal docs)
- /apply — express-interest form (contributor)
- /register — express-interest form (founder)
- /contact — express-interest form (client)
- /README.md
- /skill.md
- /manifest.json
- /llms.txt

Authenticated surface (DAO members only):
- Same routes as public surface — operator sections (Manage Projects, Budgets, Contributors, Applications, Billings, Proposals) are revealed inline on /work, /treasury, /team when the signed-in NEAR account holds an operator role on the DAO
- /admin/projects/$slug — per-project deep dive (budget, contributors, NEARN snapshot)
- /admin/settings — admin-only operational identity (NEARN account, urls, description, contact email); the active DAO (orgAccountId) is read-only here

Useful assumptions:
- The agency's treasury IS a Sputnik DAO contract; this dashboard observes via NEAR RPC
- Payment proposals are submitted from NEARN's Sponsor Dashboard ("Pay with NEAR Treasury") or directly via Trezu — never from this dashboard
- The underlying template lives at github.com/MultiAgency/dashboard; run `bunx everything-dev init` to instantiate your own agency from it
